calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-23-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gretchen Wettig for and with Earlene Jackson (Administrator). Rochelle Woolridge (Beneficiary) appeared by Court Call.

The Court stated that the two issues are: 1)Reduce Statutory Fees, 2)Whether Ms. Jackson's fees should be reduced for preliminary distribution without a Court Order. Ms. Jackson made a statement explaining her actions and apologized for her mistakes. Ms. Woolridge stated that she has no response. Ms. Wettig provided more information on what Ms. Jackson has done to correct her mistakes. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Re Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution/Status Report
Off Calendar Jun-04-2013 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Re Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution/Status Report
Off Calendar May-01-2013 Continued To Jun-04-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gretchen Wettig for Earlene Jackson (Administrator). Rochelle Woolridge appeared by telephone in Propria Persona.

Ms. Woolridge expressed her concerns and stated that she appeared to make sure she is kept in the loop of things. Ms. Wettig stated that waivers of accounting were obtained from both Beneficiaries after the real property was sold, explained that she fell out of communication with her Client but that they are now communicating, that they obtained someone to do the accounting, that there are wholes in the accounting which they are working on and that she anticipates the accounting being filed by the end of the month. Ms. Wettig also stated that preliminary distribution was made with out Court order, that funds in the Estate account are now secure and frozen with a balance of $196,000.00, that the preliminary distributions have not been equal and that exact figures for distribution are not known until the accounting is done. Ms. Woolridge stated that she was not aware that distribution should not have been done and that she wants to be treated fairly going forward. Status on filing of a Petition for Final Distribution/Status Report was continued to June 4, 2013 at 10:30 a.m., in Dept. 204. Ms. Woolridge may appear by court call. The July 10, 2013 hearing date given to the Status Report is vacated.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Re Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution/Status Report
